penalties.description: This appears to be an instructional demonstration video rather than a timed performance attempt.

consensus_score.reasoning: This is clearly a demonstration video showing proper technique for the peg transfer task, not an actual timed performance. The video shows step-by-step instruction with text overlays explaining each movement. No timing clock is visible, no completion is achieved, and the format indicates this is educational material rather than a scored attempt.

disagreements.rationale: Claude correctly identified this as a demonstration video without timing, while GPT incorrectly attempted to score it as a performance attempt.

claude_value.description: This appears to be an instructional demonstration video rather than a timed performance attempt.

gpt_value.description: One polo mint left the field of view and was not retrievable.

disagreements.rationale: The fundamental issue is that this is not a scoreable performance attempt but rather instructional content, making the incomplete_task penalty more appropriate than scoring individual technical errors.
Since this is a demonstration video that does not show a complete timed performance, the more conservative phase detection is more accurate.
